# Code Review

| ID | Severity | File:Line | Issue | Recommendation |
|----|----------|-----------|-------|----------------|
| 1 | High | dispatcher.py:42 | Race condition on shared state | Use a lock around the increment |
| 2 | Medium | dispatcher.py:78 | Logging missing request id | Add request_id to log line |
| 3 | Critical | dispatcher.py:120 | SQL injection via unsanitized input | Use parameterized queries |

## Verdict

The patch is not ready for merge. Fix the SQL injection before re-review.
